first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in substance, despite minor rephrasing. Both versions receive the same score and cite the exact same strengths (diverse technical background, open-source work, mentoring) and concerns (lack of C++ experience, lack of large-scale cloud platform experience, leadership not in a cloud/DevOps context). The change in job locations from various Western/European cities to Brazil did not introduce any new concerns or alter the core assessment of the candidate's skills against the job requirements.
